message:
perf(sync,service): add semaphore atomic shadows, barrier pre-alloc, pool SmallVec, rate limiter batching

Semaphore atomic shadows (semaphore.rs):
- Added permits_shadow: AtomicUsize and closed_shadow: AtomicBool as
  lock-free read paths for available_permits() and is_closed(). These
  are the two most frequently called diagnostic methods, often polled
  in tight loops or metrics collectors. With shadows, readers no longer
  contend for the parking_lot::Mutex that guards the waiter queue.
- All mutation paths (try_acquire, add_permits, close, AcquireFuture::poll,
  OwnedAcquireFuture::poll) update the shadow atomics under the existing
  lock, so shadows are always consistent with the authoritative state.
- Ordering: Release on writes (under lock), Acquire on reads.

Barrier pre-allocation (barrier.rs):
- BarrierState.waiters now pre-allocates with_capacity(parties - 1),
  since the barrier knows its party count upfront and will collect
  exactly that many wakers before releasing.

Pool SmallVec waker collection (pool.rs):
- process_returns() waiters_to_wake changed from Vec<Waker> to
  SmallVec<[Waker; 4]> — most return batches wake 1-4 waiters,
  avoiding a heap allocation on the common path.

Rate limiter metrics batching (combinator/rate_limit.rs):
- process_queue() previously acquired the metrics write lock inside
  the per-entry grant loop, locking/unlocking once per granted token.
  This commit accumulates granted_count, acc_wait_time, and max_wait_time
  on the stack, then flushes to the metrics write lock once after the
  loop. For burst grants this reduces lock acquisitions from N to 1.
- The "stop at first ungrantable" comment cleaned up (was a question
  comment, now a definitive statement with break).

Concurrency limit type simplification (concurrency_limit.rs):
- State::Acquiring variant simplified from
  Pin<Box<dyn Future<Output = Result<OwnedSemaphorePermit, AcquireError>> + Send>>
  to Pin<Box<OwnedAcquireFuture>>, which is equivalent but far more
  readable and avoids repeating the trait object bounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -75,13 +75,7 @@ impl<S> Layer<S> for ConcurrencyLimitLayer {
 /// Internal state for the concurrency limit service.
 enum State {
     Idle,
-    Acquiring(
-        Pin<
-            Box<
-                dyn Future<Output = Result<OwnedSemaphorePermit, crate::sync::AcquireError>> + Send,
-            >,
-        >,
-    ),
+    Acquiring(Pin<Box<OwnedAcquireFuture>>),
     Ready(OwnedSemaphorePermit),
 }
